desc: Creates a detail line in the active view between two points specified in millimetres.
summary: Creates a detail line in the active view between two points specified in millimetres. Optionally applies a named line style via ResolveLineStyle. Coordinates are converted from mm to feet internally. Uses CommandExecutor to retrieve parameters from the AI orchestrator. Related: AddFilledRegionCommand for creating filled regions in the same view.
usecase: User wants to draw a detail line between two known coordinates. AI needs to add annotation lines to a drafting or detail view.
notfor: Creating model lines in 3D (use ModelLine API instead). Drawing multiple connected lines (use a polyline command or loop externally). Creating filled regions (use AddFilledRegionCommand).
precondition: Active document must be open with a detail-capable view (floor plan, section, drafting view). Coordinates x1, y1, x2, y2 must be provided in millimetres.
postcondition: A new DetailCurve is created in the active view. If a line style name was provided and found, it is applied to the new curve.

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Detail line creation result with element ID

preprompts: Drawing a detail line in the active view...
thinkingsteps: Converting coordinates from mm to feet...
Creating detail curve in the active view...
successprompts: Done — detail line drawn between your two points.
